security_proposition: The obfuscated PowerShell and LSASS-access events are credential-dumping activity rather than a benign test command with ordinary Windows process access.

attack_category.note: RESEARCHER-INTENT: evidence_condition = COUNTER (obfuscation looks malicious, but deterministic deobfuscation reveals benign Write-Host 'Hello, World!'; plus the lsass-direction trap). Calibration role = over-triage-prone (down-rank). Distinct from PS-001 (Base64/missing): here the payload is present and decodable -> counter.

tier.why_single_source: The obfuscated_powershell folder contains ONLY windows-sysmon.log (single host win-dc-397) + a .yml manifest. Tier-1 single-sensor, verified this build.

boundary_definition: A0 = the obfuscated powershell (record 28476), launched interactively via explorer -> cmd.
EV = the parent cmd, the benign PSScriptPolicyTest, and the two lsass->powershell EID10 access events (counter).
EXCLUDED: heavy benign desktop noise (Explorer.EXE -> SearchUI/ShellExperienceHost/firefox handle-opens) and csrss/conhost/svchost handle-opens.

main_alert_selection.selection_method: powershell.exe running a string-obfuscated command piped to iex is the T1059.001 obfuscation detection.
main_alert_selection.selection_reason: The obfuscated command is the alert; deterministic deobfuscation (DER-001) reveals the benign payload -> counter-evidence.

event_groups.description: lsass.exe is the SOURCE accessing powershell (NOT powershell dumping lsass).

A0.role_note: triggering alert: powershell.exe ran a string-obfuscated command (concat + char-code Replace) piped to iex

EV-001.role_note: parent cmd.exe, launched interactively by explorer.exe

EV-003.role_note: COUNTER: lsass.exe accessed the powershell process (lsass is SOURCE, not target)

EV-004.role_note: COUNTER: lsass.exe accessed the powershell process (lsass is SOURCE, not target)

curation_notes.note: over-triage-prone COUNTER case; obfuscation looks malicious but DER-001 reconstructs a benign Write-Host, and the lsass access is lsass->ps (reversed direction).
DER-001 = concat single-quoted fragments + .Replace('aAg',[char]39) -> Write-Host 'Hello, World!'. A text reconstruction, not execution.
Distinct from PS-001: PS-001 is Base64 with the payload ABSENT (missing); PS-003 is string-concat with the payload PRESENT-and-decodable (counter).

preprocessing_required: project raw fields to neutral attributes

review_required.ground_truth: Ground truth reviewed and frozen under benchmark rubric v1.1.
